title: FinResearch AI
label: ⭐ Featured
description: AI-powered financial research assistant that aggregates data, generates insights, and answers complex finance questions using LLM integrations. Built end-to-end with RAG pipelines and real-time data feeds.

title: Spotify Music Intelligence Platform
label: Personal Project
description: Full medallion architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) with 4 ML models (XGBoost, LightGBM, K-Means, SVD) and GenAI features powered by the Claude API. Generates personalized music insights and recommendations.

title: MDM Golden Record Consolidation
label: IBM · State of Arizona
description: Processed ~20M raw citizen records into ~8M de-duplicated golden records using MDM rules, probabilistic matching, and survivorship logic for the Arizona Department of Child Safety.

title: AI-Powered Allegation Classifier
label: IBM · State of Arizona
description: Azure Functions + OpenAI GPT + vector databases classifying ~394K child safety allegation records with ~95% accuracy. Replaced entirely manual triage workflows and reduced processing time by 80%.

title: MDM Event Hub Publishing Pipeline
label: IBM · State of Arizona
description: Real-time MDM event streaming via Apache Kafka to Azure Event Hub, enabling downstream consumers with sub-second latency at government scale.

title: MDM 3.0 CDP Medallion Migration
label: IBM · State of Arizona
description: Full Bronze-Silver-Gold medallion architecture migration in Azure Synapse Analytics for the Customer Data Platform, enabling self-service analytics across government departments.

title: DNSSEC Mapping Automation
label: University Research
description: Built automation scripts to update global DNSSEC map statuses via REST API and generate analytical CSVs from MariaDB. Fixed Node.js backend authentication bugs in the research platform for Prof. Auffret's group.
